name: Clams Sailor Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak clams in salty water for 5 hours before preparing dish, and rinse.
2. In a large pan, sauté garlic in oil. Add parsley and clams; cover and cook for 5 to 10 minutes until the clams open.
3. Once clams are open, add bread crumbs, salt, white wine, and chile. Stir the mixture frequently over medium heat for about 5 minutes until the sauce thickens.
